title: No Creeper & Ghast Explosions
description: Prevents Creepers and Ghasts exploding blocks, but they still do damage. Very lag friendly and optimised.
body:
Creeper & Ghast Fireball Block Protection

  • ✅ No Block Destruction: Creeper and ghast explosions spare your builds.
  • ✅ Damage Preserved: Players & mobs still feel the blast.
  • ✅ Performance: Highly optimized for smooth gameplay.
Technical Details
  1. Temporarily sets mobGriefing to false right before creepers explode.
  2. Sets ghast fireball explosion power to 0.
Note: May not work on all servers for unknown reasons.

Enjoy block-safe explosions!
